name: L'Alchimiste Cafe Boutique
summary: Central Bordeaux specialty roaster/cafe candidate near the historic core.
whyItMatters: A strong Bordeaux coffee target for the Stage 7 city day, especially if the group wants better coffee before moving toward the finish crowds.
pros: European Coffee Trip lists L'Alchimiste in its Bordeaux specialty guide
OpenStreetMap identifies the cafe-boutique at Rue de la Vieille Tour
Central location should pair well with a Bordeaux walking morning
cons: Current opening hours were not found in crawlable official sources
Stage 7 finish crowds may make central movement slower
